title: The Pragmatic Programmer: Your Journey to Mastery
author: David Thomas, Andrew Hunt
excerpt: A collection of pragmatic tips and best practices for software development. Covers personal responsibility, career development, architectural techniques. Popularized concepts like DRY, rubber duck debugging, and the broken windows theory.
whoShouldRead: Readers interested in Computer Science and Programming and Software Engineering
keyIdeas: Central thesis of The Pragmatic Programmer: Your Journey to Mastery
keyTakeaways: Understand the core argument and its implications
